name: poketbook
subtitle: Digital Udhar Khaata by Flutter Fox
description: Install poketbook — fast double-entry ledger for Indian shopkeepers. Track Naam & Jama, auto-backup to Google Sheets, get email reports. Same database as web app.

apps.name: poketbook
apps.subtitle: Digital Udhar Khaata
apps.localizedDescription:
poketbook is a fast, accurate double-entry ledger for Indian shopkeepers and traders.

• Track Naam (Credit) & Jama (Debit) with automatic balance
• Auto-backup to Google Sheets
• WhatsApp-style email backup
• Phone OTP login
• PDF & Excel export
• 7-day FREE trial
• Same database as web app (poketbook.in)

versions.localizedDescription:
Initial release of poketbook iOS app.

• Double-entry ledger
• Google Sheets backup
• Email auto-backup
• Phone OTP login
• 7-day FREE trial

privacy.name: Contacts
privacy.usageDescription: Used to autofill party mobile numbers

news.title: poketbook is on AltStore!
news.caption: Install the iOS app — shares same database as web app
